Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.emptyDescription: Menu creation is almost ready. Your published menus and QR codes will appear here once you build your first one.

hero.badge: New — Auto-parse from any PDF or photo
hero.description: Turn your printed menu into a beautiful mobile page and a QR code for your tables. No apps to download, no menus to reprint — edit a dish and it updates everywhere, instantly.
hero.trustLine: Trusted by bistros, bars, bakeries and brasseries.

tataki.name: Tuna Tataki
tataki.desc: Bluefin loin, ponzu, daikon, fresh wasabi.

process.title:
From your menu
to your table in minutes.

upload.title: Upload your menu
upload.description: Send us a PDF, a photo of your printed menu, or even a snapshot on your phone. Wine stains and all — we handle it.

build.title: We build your page
build.description: Every dish, price, and description is organized into a beautiful mobile menu. Add photos, allergens, and dietary tags with one click.

print.title: Print the QR
print.description: Download a print-ready QR card, laminate it, place it on your tables. Diners scan, browse, and order — no download needed.

preview.title:
A menu worth
opening.
preview.description: Gorgeous dish photos, clear prices, allergen badges, and a tap-to-call-waiter button. Works on every phone, loads in under a second, and feels like a native app.

photos.title: Real food photos
photos.meta: Upload yours, or use our library

waiter.title: Call waiter button
waiter.meta: One tap on the diner's phone

bourguignon.name: Boeuf Bourguignon
bourguignon.desc: Beef braised 6 hours in Burgundy wine, baby carrots, glazed pearl onions, smoked bacon.

risotto.name: Truffle Risotto
risotto.desc: Carnaroli rice, Normandy butter, 24-month parmigiano, raw black truffle shavings.

tataki.name: Tuna Tataki
tataki.desc: Bluefin loin seared in sesame, house ponzu, daikon, cilantro, fresh wasabi.

tarte.name: Tarte Tatin
tarte.desc: Upside-down caramelized reinette apples, butter shortcrust, Tahitian vanilla cream.

qrDemo.description: Add your logo to the center, pick your colors, and print it on anything — paper, wood, steel, vinyl. We handle the math so it still scans reliably, every time.

clara.name: Clara Domínguez
clara.quote: Our reprints cost us nearly €400 a year. With QRmenucrafter, I update a dish from my phone between lunch and dinner.

thomas.name: Thomas Renaud
thomas.quote: The translation is the killer feature. Our tourists finally order confidently — and upsells on wine are up 18%.

sara.name: Sara Kouassi
sara.quote: Setup took us a single afternoon. Our servers love it — they just point at the QR, the rest is on the diner.

pricing.title:
One plan per restaurant.
No surprises.

faq.helpLine: Can't find your answer? Email us at hello@qrmenucrafter.com — a human replies within an hour, every day of the week.

savvy.q: Do I need to be tech-savvy?
savvy.a: Not at all. If you can take a photo with your phone, you can use QRmenucrafter. Upload your menu and we do the rest — no training needed.

price.q: What if I change a price tomorrow?
price.a: Edit any dish from your phone and it updates instantly. The QR on your tables never changes — it always shows your latest menu.

wifi.q: Does it work without restaurant wifi?
wifi.a: Yes. Your diners use their own phone data or your wifi. Our menus are tiny and load in under a second, even on a weak signal.

scans.a: Never. Every plan — including the free one — comes with unlimited scans.

domain.q: Can I use my own domain?
domain.a: Yes, on the Restaurant plan and above. Point your domain to us and we handle the rest, including the secure certificate.

footerCta.description: No credit card required. You can print your QR today.

footer.tagline: Digital menus and QR codes, built for restaurants. Made in Madrid, served worldwide.
footer.madeWith: Made with care in Madrid · hello@qrmenucrafter.com
